title: Genetic triple dissociation reveals multiple roles for dopamine in reinforcement learning
journal: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences
notes: Primary open-access source for the classic PSS structure: three training pairs, probabilistic feedback, and transfer test.

title: Dopamine and performance in a reinforcement learning task: evidence from Parkinson’s disease
notes: Open-access reinforcement-learning task paper that reproduces the standard PSS acquisition/test design.

title: Instructional control of reinforcement learning: A behavioral and neurocomputational investigation
notes: Open-access task-control paper describing the same PSS training/test architecture and an instructional variant.

title: Variability in Dopamine Genes Dissociates Model-Based and Model-Free Reinforcement Learning
notes: Open-access supporting paper that includes the PSS transfer phase in a larger reinforcement-learning battery.
